# Cloudflare's managed robots.txt, using the Content-Signals syntax.
# From 15 September 2026 these defaults apply automatically to new domains and
# un-reviewed free-tier customers.

User-agent: *
Content-Signal: search=yes, ai-input=yes, ai-train=no
Allow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /

Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://example.com/news-sitemap.xml
